ddls:
CREATE TABLE "toys" (
  "toy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each toy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the toy record was created */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the toy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the toy */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the toy belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the toy */,
  "included_in_home" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the toy is included in the home collection */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the toy */,
  "cost_price" TEXT /* Cost price of the toy */,
  "retail_price" TEXT /* Retail price of the toy */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the toy */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the toy */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Recommended age group for the toy */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) the toy is made from */,
  "safety_certification" TEXT /* Safety certifications the toy has */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Last modification date of the toy record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("toy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_toys_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each toy category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the toy category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "toy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the toy */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the toy in stock */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse where the toy is stored */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Last update date of the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for automatic reordering */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the toy */,
  "last_received_date" TEXT /* Last date the toy was received in inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_toy_id FOREIGN KEY ("toy_id") REFERENCES toys ("toy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "toy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the toy sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of toys sold in the transaction */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "store_location" TEXT /* Location of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the toy at the time of sale */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sales_person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salesperson who made the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sales_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_person_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_toy_id FOREIGN KEY ("toy_id") REFERENCES toys ("toy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturing" (
  "manufacturing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturing process */,
  "toy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the toy being manufactured */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the manufacturing process */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the manufacturing process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the manufacturing process (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "estimated_cost" TEXT /* Estimated cost of manufacturing */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost of manufacturing */,
  "quality_check_passed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the quality check was passed */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the manufacturing record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturing_toy_id FOREIGN KEY ("toy_id") REFERENCES toys ("toy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "toy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the toy included in the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotional campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotional campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotional campaign */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Discount percentage for the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., sale, bundle, gift) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion */,
  "promotion_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_toy_id FOREIGN KEY ("toy_id") REFERENCES toys ("toy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the company */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
